description: Fetch a page and identify its title text
prompt: Fetch the page at https://example.com and tell me what heading or title appears on it.

description: Fetch a JSON endpoint and extract a field
prompt: Fetch the JSON at https://httpbin.org/json and tell me the value of the 'title' field of the slideshow.

description: Fetch two pages and answer a question about both
prompt: Fetch https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains. Do both pages mention the word 'example'? Answer yes or no.

description: Error recovery after a host that does not resolve
prompt: Try to fetch http://this-domain-does-not-exist-987654321.invalid/ first. If it fails, fetch https://example.com instead and tell me what heading is on that page.

description: Fetch a UUID endpoint and report the value
prompt: Fetch https://httpbin.org/uuid and tell me the UUID value that the response contains.

description: Fetch a page and check for a specific word
prompt: Fetch https://example.com. Does the page body contain the word 'illustrative'? Answer yes or no.

description: Fetch a page and identify the link it points to
prompt: Fetch https://example.com. The page contains exactly one hyperlink in its body. Tell me what domain that link points to.

description: Fetch a JSON document and navigate a nested field
prompt: Fetch https://httpbin.org/json. In the slideshow object, the slides array has multiple entries. Tell me the 'type' of the first slide.

description: Error recovery after a non-2xx HTTP response
prompt: Fetch https://httpbin.org/status/500. If the request fails or returns an error, fetch https://example.com instead and tell me the page's main heading.

description: Fetch two endpoints and combine the result
prompt: Fetch both https://httpbin.org/uuid and https://httpbin.org/json. Tell me both: the uuid value, and the title of the slideshow.

description: Fetch a headers endpoint and extract one header
prompt: Fetch https://httpbin.org/headers. The response is JSON listing the request headers. Tell me the value of the 'Host' header.

description: Fetch JSON and count array elements
prompt: Fetch https://httpbin.org/json. How many slides are in the slideshow's 'slides' array? Tell me the number.

description: Fetch a page and a JSON endpoint, report both
prompt: Fetch https://example.com and https://httpbin.org/uuid. Tell me both the heading on example.com and the uuid value from the other endpoint.

description: Read a file and report a specific line
prompt: Read the file 'notes.txt' in your working directory and tell me what the third line says.

description: Write a file with exact content
prompt: Create a file named 'greeting.txt' in your working directory containing exactly the text: Hello, MCP!

description: List a directory and count files by extension
prompt: Look at the files in your working directory. How many of them have the .txt extension?

description: Read two files and compare their content
prompt: Read the files 'a.txt' and 'b.txt'. Do they contain the same content? Answer yes or no.

description: Search for a file by name pattern in a directory tree
prompt: There is a file somewhere in this directory tree whose name contains the word 'secret'. Find it and tell me its name (just the filename, not the full path).

description: Edit a file by replacing one word
prompt: There is a file 'report.md' in your working directory. Replace the word 'TODO' with the word 'DONE' in that file. Keep the rest of the content unchanged.

description: Create a directory and place a file in it
prompt: Create a directory named 'out' in your working directory, and inside it create a file 'summary.txt' that contains the word: done

description: Rename a file, preserving content
prompt: Rename the file 'old_name.txt' to 'new_name.txt'. Do not change its content.

description: Error recovery: read a missing file, then create it
prompt: First, try to read the file 'does_not_exist.txt'. If reading it fails because the file is missing, then create that file with the content: placeholder

description: Read multiple files and sum a numeric property
prompt: There are several .log files in your working directory. Count the total number of lines across all of them and tell me the total. (A line is anything ending in a newline.)

description: Read multiple files and write their concatenation
prompt: There are three text files (a.txt, b.txt, c.txt) in your working directory. Read all of them and write a new file 'combined.txt' that contains the contents of all three.

description: Identify the largest file by size
prompt: Several files are in your working directory. Tell me the name of the file that has the largest size in bytes.

description: Read a number, compute, and write it back
prompt: The file 'counter.txt' contains a single integer. Read it, add 1 to it, and write the new value back to 'counter.txt'.

description: Find and delete the file with specific content
prompt: Three files are in your working directory. Exactly one of them contains the text 'DELETE ME'. Find that file and delete it. Leave the others untouched.

description: Look up the default branch of a public GitHub repository
prompt: What is the name of the default branch of the GitHub repository 'microsoft/vscode'?

description: Report the primary programming language of a public repo
prompt: What is the primary programming language reported by GitHub for the 'microsoft/TypeScript' repository?

description: Fetch the LICENSE file of a repo and identify the license
prompt: Fetch the LICENSE file from the 'modelcontextprotocol/servers' repository on GitHub and tell me which type of open-source license it grants.

description: Search an organization's repositories and check for existence
prompt: Search GitHub for repositories owned by the 'anthropics' organization. Does a repository named 'prompt-eng-interactive-tutorial' appear in the results? Answer yes or no.

description: Read a repository description and identify a keyword
prompt: Fetch the description of the 'modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk' repository on GitHub. Does the description mention Python? Answer yes or no.

description: Fetch a README and confirm a keyword is present
prompt: Fetch the README of the 'modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk' repository on GitHub. Does it mention the Model Context Protocol? Answer yes or no.

description: Search a repository for a file matching a keyword
prompt: In the GitHub repository 'modelcontextprotocol/servers', is there any file or directory whose name contains the word 'sqlite'? Answer yes or no.

description: Fetch metadata from two repos and compare a field
prompt: Look up the default branch of both 'microsoft/vscode' and 'modelcontextprotocol/servers'. Are the two default branch names identical? Answer yes or no.

description: Error recovery: query a non-existent repo, then a real one
prompt: First, try to fetch the default branch of the repository 'this-org-does-not-exist-xyz999/nonexistent-repo'. If that fails because the repository does not exist, instead fetch the default branch of 'modelcontextprotocol/servers' and tell me its name.

description: Search issues for a topical keyword and check existence
prompt: Search the issues of the 'modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk' repository on GitHub for ones that mention the word 'tool'. Does at least one such issue exist? Answer yes or no.

description: Create a single entity in the knowledge graph
prompt: Store a new entity in memory named 'Alice' with the entity type 'person'.

description: Create an entity carrying an observation
prompt: Remember that 'Paris' is a city. Record an observation on it stating that it is the capital of France.

description: Create two entities and a relation between them
prompt: Create an entity 'Alice' (type person) and an entity 'Acme' (type company). Then record that Alice works at Acme.

description: Add an observation to a pre-existing entity
prompt: There is already a person named 'Bob' in memory. Add an observation to Bob recording that he likes coffee.

description: Read the graph and count entities
prompt: How many entities are currently stored in memory? Tell me the number.

description: Search the graph for a matching node
prompt: Search memory for any node related to 'Python' and tell me the name of the entity you find.

description: Delete an entity from the graph
prompt: Delete the entity named 'Bob' from memory.

description: Query the graph across relations
prompt: Using memory, tell me the names of everyone who works at 'Acme'.

description: Error recovery: add observation to a non-existent entity, then create it
prompt: Add the observation 'newly created' to an entity named 'Ghost'. If that fails because Ghost does not exist, create Ghost as a person first and then add the observation.

description: Build a multi-entity relation chain
prompt: Create three people named 'X', 'Y', and 'Z'. Record that X knows Y, and that Y knows Z.

description: Count rows in a single table
prompt: Query the database: how many employees are there in total?

description: Read every row of the departments table
prompt: Query the database for the names of every department. List all of them.

description: Find the row with the earliest date in a column
prompt: Which employee has the earliest hire date according to the database? Tell me their name.

description: Aggregate query (average) across a table
prompt: Compute the average salary across all employees. Tell me the integer-rounded value.

description: Find the employee with the maximum value across a join
prompt: Which employee earns the highest salary? Tell me their name.

description: Join with a WHERE filter and order by date
prompt: Who is the most recently hired employee in the 'Sales' department? Tell me their name.

description: Count rows filtered by joined table
prompt: How many employees work in the 'Engineering' department? Give me the count.

description: Aggregate across all rows (sum)
prompt: What is the total payroll (sum of every salary) across all employees?

description: Enumerate all tables in the schema
prompt: What tables exist in this Postgres database? List every one of them.

description: Error recovery: query a misspelled table name
prompt: Query the 'salary' table for the maximum salary amount. (Note: that table name might be misspelled in the prompt — figure out the correct table if so.)

description: Count rows in a single table
prompt: How many rows are in the 'users' table?

description: Count with a WHERE filter
prompt: How many users in the 'users' table are older than 30? Tell me the count.

description: List the columns of a table
prompt: List every column name in the 'products' table.

description: Insert a new row
prompt: Insert a new user into the 'users' table with name 'Alice' and age 42.

description: Aggregate query (average)
prompt: What is the average price of products in the 'products' table? Round to one decimal place.

description: Join two tables and list results
prompt: Find the names of every user who has placed at least one order. Use the 'users' and 'orders' tables.

description: Enumerate all tables in the database
prompt: What tables exist in this database? List every one of them.

description: Update an existing row
prompt: In the 'users' table, change Bob's age to 50.

description: Delete a row matching a condition
prompt: Delete the user named 'Charlie' from the 'users' table.

description: Error recovery: query a misspelled table name
prompt: Find the maximum age in the 'userz' table and report it. (Note: that name might be misspelled in the prompt — figure out the correct table if so.)

description: Find the row with the maximum value
prompt: In the 'users' table, who is the oldest user? Tell me their name.

description: Create a table then insert into it
prompt: Create a new table named 'log' with two columns: id (integer) and message (text). Then insert one row whose message is 'hello'.

description: Aggregate across a join to find the top item
prompt: Two tables exist: 'products' (id, name) and 'sales' (product_id, quantity). Which product has the highest total quantity sold? Tell me its name.
